Localization.Description: The NET utility was used. Attackers use the NET utility with the "use" parameter for network reconnaissance, accessing network shares, credential checks, and lateral movement.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Attempt to save credential data to connect to network shares on behalf of user {subject.account.name} using utility {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
Network share "{object.name}" was accessed on behalf of user {object.account.name} from host {src.host} using utility {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
Attempt to save credential data to connect to network share "{datafield15}" on behalf of user {subject.account.name} using the NET utility on host {event_src.host}
Attempt to obtain information about network connections using utility {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
Attempt to delete all connections to network shares on behalf of user {subject.account.name} using utility {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
Attempt to save credential data of user {datafield14} to connect to a network share on behalf of user {subject.account.name} using utility {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
Attempt to save credential data of user {datafield14} to connect to network share "{datafield15}" on behalf of user {subject.account.name} using utility {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
Attempt to delete connections to network share "{datafield15}" on behalf of user {subject.account.name} using utility {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
Attempt to delete connections to network shares on behalf of user {subject.account.name} using utility {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} attempted to access network share "{datafield15}" using the credentials of user {datafield14} and utility {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
